compiled_state.title: CI: test_worktree_sync_script_removed fails — worktree-sync-from-main.sh not yet removed
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: Pre-existing CI failure on main. test-merge-no-sync-lib.sh::test_worktree_sync_script_removed expects plugins/dso/scripts/worktree-sync-from-main.sh to be removed as part of v2 cleanup, but the script still exists. Either the script should be removed or the test should be updated.

comments.body: INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED: safeguard_approval | Script worktree-sync-from-main.sh still exists and is referenced in 9 files (sprint SKILL.md, WORKTREE-GUIDE.md, .test-index, etc.). Removing it requires safeguard file edits across scripts/ and skills/. The test expectation was part of a v2 cleanup that was never completed. Options: (a) complete the removal (safeguard), (b) revert the test expectation if the script should stay. Re-run in interactive session to decide.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 1 (BASIC). Test asserts script is removed but script still exists.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Investigation RESULT: ROOT_CAUSE: Commit 76e90772 added test asserting worktree-sync-from-main.sh removed, but actual file deletion was never committed. Script still exists and is referenced in 9 files. CONFIDENCE: high. FIX: Delete script, its test, and update all references to point to merge-to-main.sh inline logic.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
